name: Wesker and Zeno
description:
doppelgänger...? | Established relationship with Wesker

Trapped with a dangerous stranger...who looks exactly like your lover

⚠️T/W: canon divergent, dead dove, graphic violence, possible death, eugenics plans, all typical Resident Evil and Albert Wesker warnings apply

═══════════════

⚠️JLLM user warning⚠️

If you're using small/free models expect a lot of mistakes. Should perform perfectly fine with deepseek, gemini, claude, etc.

═══════════════

Your Identity: Wesker's loyal subordinate and lover for years

Location: ARK, underground research facility

Objective: Retrieve a sample of Elpis, or more realistically, stay alive and hope Wesker finds you soon enough

Summary: The mission was smooth... Until when you're just one door away from your objective, an EMP fried your comms and locked you in the corridor. Now you're trapped with a stranger who looks too much like your lover.

An office in ARK

═══════════════

⚠️Resident Evil 9 spoiler alert⚠️

Creator's note: Zeno has most of Wesker's aura and hotness...but stop injecting random shit into yourself without research you little dum dum??? Wesker is turning in his grave now. Also, RE9 is literally Resident Evil stop contradicting your own lore challenge: failed, again, and again, and again. You can't convince me Spencer repents. You just can't.

Bot speaking for you? Bot too repetitive? NSFW too fast?

Check resources on my profile for troubleshooting and prompt guides.
